metadata.title: GRC Pipeline Challenge — implemented controls profile
metadata.remarks: Exactly the NIST SP 800-53 rev5 controls this repository genuinely implements with signed-evidence traceability. Deliberately excluded despite README mentions: AU-3/AU-6 (Week 1 access logging is implemented but has no signed evidence bundle; nothing performs log review — note AU-12 is claimed with its AU-3 content requirement asserted, not evidenced), SI-4/RA-5 (SCC Standard is activated but Security Health Analytics is unentitled on new Standard-tier activations, so no scanner actually runs — claiming monitoring would be padding), AU-9 (the evidence vault with 90-day retention policy is applied and the preservation check passes against it, but that check's output is not yet itself a signed bundle; AU-9 joins this profile when the preservation evidence is signed into the chain).
